# 标题
kernel “ltp执行长稳测试，在/var/lib/systemd/coredump目录下产生大量core dump文件”

# 基本信息
- 测试用例: ltpstress
- 系统版本: openEuler-24.03-LTS-SP3(aarch64)
- 是否问题：否
- 关联issue：https://atomgit.com/src-openeuler/kernel/issues/14162

# 问题现象
ltp测试执行，用例执行通过，但是在/var/lib/systemd/coredump目录下产生大量core dump文件

# 错误日志
```
[root@localhost ltp]# ll /var/lib/systemd/coredump/
total 1472
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32437 May  1 03:42 core.abort01.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.60753.1777578141000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32399 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101499.1777579248000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32384 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101502.1777579248000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32379 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101515.1777579248000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32393 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101525.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32398 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101536.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32398 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101545.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32389 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101554.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32405 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101565.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32396 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101580.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32398 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101589.1777579249000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32408 May  1 04:00 core.kill11.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.101603.1777579250000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 31555 May  1 04:04 core.madvise07.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.107012.1777579488000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32437 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103167.1777579293000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32513 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103172.1777579293000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32514 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103182.1777579293000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32514 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103191.1777579293000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32516 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103200.1777579293000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32521 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103210.1777579294000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32513 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103218.1777579294000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32514 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103228.1777579294000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32514 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103237.1777579294000000.lz4
-rw-r-----. 1 root root 32514 May  1 04:01 core.mmap16.0.49751048ef934132851c303705c99249.103248.1777579294000000.lz4
```

# 问题根因
1.上游社区有已知问题：这是内核测试套件的一部分，部分测试用例故意让内核或进程崩溃，目的是覆盖内核中所有的代码路径（codepaths），也就是说，崩溃和core dump是预期行为，用来测试内核在异常情况下的处理逻辑，相关issue：https://github.com/linux-test-project/ltp/issues/682 

# 解决方案
1. 非问题
